name: Stromboli
recipeIngredient: Thawed bread dough (1 lb each loaf)
recipeInstructions:
1. Let the dough rise in a warm place until doubled in size.
2. Punch down the dough.
3. Roll the loaves together into one 15x12-inch rectangle.
4. Layer half of the dough lengthwise with sliced ham and pepperoni.
5. Sprinkle chopped onion and diced green pepper over the meat.
6. Add 1/4 cup of pizza sauce.
7. Layer sliced mozzarella, bologna, salami, and Swiss cheese on top.
8. Sprinkle dried basil, oregano, garlic powder, and black pepper over the cheese.
9. Spread another 1/4 cup of pizza sauce on top.
10. Fold the plain half of the dough over the filling and seal the edges well.
11. Place the stromboli on an ungreased baking pan measuring 15x10x1 inches.
12. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 30-35 minutes, or until golden brown.
13. Brush with melted butter before serving.
14. Serve with additional pizza sauce and sliced stromboli.
